news.title: DeKalb County officer terminated, facing charges after 19-year-old shot and killed
news.summary: The GBI said the officer will be booked into the DeKalb County Jail once he is in custody.

news.title: DeKalb County officer charged in Avondale Estates backyard shooting
news.summary: A DeKalb County police officer faces involuntary manslaughter and reckless conduct charges following a deadly shooting in Avondale Estates.

news.title: Dog killed as Cobb County deputy serves warrant
news.summary: A Cobb County Sheriff's Office deputy shot and killed a dog in Cobb County while serving an arrest warrant Wednesday.

news.title: Bond denied for DeKalb murder suspect in Memorial Drive shooting
news.summary: A man accused of killing a person behind a DeKalb County tire shop will stay in jail for now after making his first court appearance Wednesday afternoon.

news.title: Douglas County leaders just killed a massive data center project
news.summary: Douglas County leaders rejected a massive data center development following an intense public hearing filled with heavy community pushback.

news.title: Man killed in officer-involved shooting after armed robbery investigation in DeKalb neighborhood
news.summary: A quiet DeKalb County neighborhood became the center of a police investigation Tuesday night after a man was shot and killed by an officer following an armed robbery investigation.

news.title: From license plates to cigarettes: What police see from above
news.summary: Atlanta Police helicopters are giving officers a unique high-tech advantage when fighting crime and managing large crowds across the city.

news.title: Man accused of killing wife, shooting son in metro Atlanta home
news.summary: A Cobb County man is accused of killing his wife and shooting their son.

news.title: Man arrested for killing wife, shooting son in domestic incident in Smyrna, police say
news.summary: Police responded to a home on Laurel Creek Trail near Smyrna around 7:55 p.m. and found a woman dead inside the home and a man shot outside the home.

news.title: Victims in deadly Cobb County domestic shooting identified
news.summary: Police arrested a man Tuesday night after a domestic dispute escalated into a deadly shooting that left one woman dead and another man hospitalized.

news.title: Human trafficking investigation in Marietta leads to arrest of 3 teens, 1 juvenile
news.summary: A maintenance worker reported squatters in a vacant unit, leading to the discovery of three young men and two underage girls sleeping in the apartment.

news.title: Big Tigger's wife arrested in Hart County on kidnapping warrant out of Maryland
news.summary: The Hart County Sheriff's Office identified the suspect as 37-year-old Alicia Denise Brown of Atlanta, the wife of Big Tigger.

news.title: K9 unit captures wanted sex crimes fugitive in Riverdale
news.summary: A police drug unit and tracking K9 captured a wanted sex crimes fugitive who attempted to slip away through a back door during a targeted arrest in Riverdale.

news.title: DeKalb woman linked to $300K refund fraud scheme targeting TJ Maxx, HomeGoods and Marshalls
news.summary: A metro Atlanta woman is facing decades in prison after pleading no contest to racketeering, conspiracy to commit racketeering and fraud charges. The plea was made in the Twentieth Judicial Circuit in
